commit.message:
Implement theme system (Light / Dark / System default)

Wires the existing Settings > Theme dropdown to actual visual changes:
- Four CoffeeSettings colour accessors (ThemePanelBg, ThemeTextColor,
  ThemeDimTextColor, ThemeOutlineColor) return palette values per theme
- SyncAllWindows() broadcasts MSG_THEME_CHANGED to all open windows
- Custom Draw() methods (ParticleGaugeView, SieveDistView, CalHistView,
  ExtractionBarView, RoastGaugeView, ThumbView) use theme colours for
  backgrounds, outlines, tick marks, and labels
- BTextView tips areas update view/text colour on MSG_THEME_CHANGED and
  in constructors so newly opened windows inherit the active theme
- Coffee-colour gradients and extraction zone colours are unchanged

Major data integrity fixes + invoice generation

Fixes:
- SQL injection: whitelist allowed field names in bulk update
- Service worker: never cache /api/ responses (was serving stale data)
- Sale creation: wrapped in single transaction (atomic)
- Undo sale: properly deletes sale record + resets items (was orphaning)
- Stale data: all tabs refresh via refreshKey when navigated to
- Delete auction: requires confirmation dialog
- Safe area: StorageView floating bar + HomeFeed FAB respect iOS safe area
- Loading state: AuctionDetail shows spinner while loading

New features:
- Invoice generation: tap file icon on any sale to generate printable invoice
- DELETE /api/sales/:id endpoint for proper sale reversal
- GET /api/invoices/:saleId endpoint for invoice data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: security hardening + marketplace-crm response shape (v5.52.0)

- ClamAV fail-closed: timeout/error returns clean:false, scanner flags as "error" not "clean"
- Bcrypt rounds standardised to 12 (register, reset-password, backup-codes)
- OAuth HMAC full 256-bit — removed .slice(0,32) truncation
- TOTP window: verify 0→1 to match disable route (allows 30s clock drift)
- 2FA cookie sameSite: lax→strict
- Backup code entropy: randomBytes(4)→(6) for 48-bit codes
- Password reset: atomic transaction (update + token delete)
- Portal rate-limit: getClientIp() instead of raw X-Forwarded-For
- Marketplace-CRM: fix API response shape (listingsData.listings)

commit.message:
Upgrade react-native-reanimated to 4.2.2 to fix iOS/Android build failures

RNReanimated 4.1.x was incompatible with React Native 0.83.3 — the
podspec assert_minimal_react_native_version check was crashing pod install.
Upgraded to 4.2.2 (latest stable) and react-native-worklets to 0.7.4 to
satisfy the new peer dependency. Updated Podfile.lock accordingly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Build full Fix & Flip experience: Points field, Flip vs Rent tool, Active Rehabs

Fix & Flip Analyzer:
- Add Points (origination fee) field — typically 2-4% of loan, factored into
  total cost and breakdown
- Add tooltip on Sell Closing Costs explaining what's included (agent
  commissions, title, transfer taxes — typically 6-8%)

Flip vs Rent Comparison Tool:
- Side-by-side comparison: enter property once, see flip path vs rental path
- Flip side shows net profit and ROI, rent side shows cash flow and CoC return
- 5-year projection table with 3% appreciation and 2% rent growth
- Clear winner banner with explanation
- Accessible from Pipeline > Tools

Active Rehabs (My Properties):
- New nav section under Properties for managing active flips
- "Start Rehab" button appears on green-verdict flip deals in pipeline
- Pre-rehab inspection with photo upload per room
- Contractor tracker: scope, bid, amount paid, balance, change orders
- Real-time budget vs actual spend with progress bar
- Weekly progress notes with timestamps
- Flip scorecard comparing projected vs actual numbers at close
- Supabase migration for active_rehabs table with RLS policies

All pipeline tools (Rehab Estimator, Rent Analysis, Comp Tracker) now fully
clickable instead of showing "Coming Soon"

commit.message:
fix(models): resolve relative file paths in models.json against the config file's parent directory

Previously, file:// value references in models.json headers and api_key
fields were resolved relative to the working directory. Now they resolve
relative to the directory containing the models.json file itself, which
is the expected behavior when configs live in ~/.pi/agent/.

- apply_custom_models() accepts optional base_dir (parent of models.json)
- resolve_value_with_base(): relative file:// paths are joined with base_dir
  when available; absolute paths and shell/env references are unchanged
- resolve_headers_with_base(): passes base_dir through to value resolution
- Original resolve_value/resolve_headers retained as thin wrappers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
🎯 根本修正: 日本人が自然に聞ける競馬予想動画に改善

## A. TTS前テキスト正規化の共通関数化
- `normalize_tts_text()` 関数を新規作成（video_generator.py）
- すべてのナレーション生成前に必ず正規化を実行
- レース番号: "1R" → "1レース" (正規表現で統一処理)
- 競馬記号: ◎○▲ → 本命・対抗・単穴
- 英字: AI → エーアイ、JRA → ジェイアールエー
- 個別replace処理を削除し、1箇所で集中管理

## B. 長編動画の無音間隔を根本解決
- 音声の長さに合わせてスライド表示時間を自動調整
- `duration = narration_audio.duration + 0.5` で0.5秒バッファ
- 固定時間（10秒/15秒）を廃止

## C. 音声の重なり問題を解決
- YouTube通常動画も音声長に自動調整
- ナレーション失敗時のフォールバック処理を追加

## D. Shortsを日本人らしい自然な語り口に改善
**Before (無機質):**
- "川崎1Rの本命は"
- "6番デルニエエリオントです"

**After (自然で情報豊富):**
- "今日の川崎競馬、1レース、スパーキングNCh。AIが選んだ本命は！"
- "6番、デルニエエリオント！勝率は35パーセント。対抗に1番、イチゴプリン。穴馬は5番、アンフォーギヴンを狙います。"
- "詳しい買い目は概要欄をチェック。チャンネル登録で毎日の予想をお届けします！"

## 技術的改善点
1. すべての動画形式で音声・スライドが完璧に同期
2. 無音の間がなく、テンポが自然
3. 記号・英字・略語が正しく読まれる
4. 日本語として自然な語り口

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: PostgreSQL setup script fails silently on Kali Linux

- Check pg_roles/pg_database before CREATE USER/DATABASE instead of
  suppressing errors with 2>/dev/null (hides real failures)
- Try CREATE DATABASE with OWNER clause first, fallback without
- Add ALTER DATABASE OWNER as separate step for robustness
- Add IPv6 ::1/128 to pg_hba.conf rules (localhost may resolve to ::1)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Remove integration-tests from parent modules to prevent Maven Central publishing (#6)

* Remove integration-tests from parent modules to prevent Central publishing

Revert skipPublishing workaround in integration-tests/pom.xml; instead
remove the module from the parent <modules> list so central-publishing-maven-plugin
never stages it. The CI workflow already targets the module explicitly via
-pl integration-tests, so builds and tests are unaffected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix CI to run integration-tests explicitly after removing from parent modules

Use -f integration-tests/pom.xml instead of -pl integration-tests so Maven
finds the module by path regardless of parent <modules> declaration. Split the
native job into a build step and a separate integration-test step for the same reason.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: yuokada <yuokada@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: make About panels transparent so particles canvas shows through

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): add swap to prevent OOM during QEMU arm64 apt-get

mmdebstrap's apt-get update inside the QEMU-emulated arm64 chroot
OOMs on the 7GB GitHub-hosted runner due to QEMU overhead. Add 8GB
swap before the build steps as a workaround. Also bump timeout to
120 min to account for swap I/O and note the native arm64 runner
option in comments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: fix LCP by static-importing Hero and optimizing assets

- Revert Hero to static import so H1 renders in initial server HTML
- Restrict Google Font weights (Inter 400-700, Montserrat 700-900)
- Enable AVIF/WebP image formats in next.config
- Lazy-load LogoMarquee images (below the fold)
- Defer Hero decorative background with content-visibility: auto

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Set signing keychain as default + partition list before archive

Xcode installs new dev certs into the default keychain. Without
setting our persistent keychain as default, Xcode tries the login
keychain which may be locked ("User interaction is not allowed").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Column Projection Pushdown (#119)

Only access/pivot the columns from the Xarray dataset that are actually
used by the query.

For a `SELECT temperature FROM ds` query on a 250-variable ERA5 dataset,
this reduces per-partition data loading from ~38 GB to ~1.5 GB (the
temperature array plus coordinate columns).

Fixes #103, Fixes #138.

---------

commit.message:
Link scanned receipt document to the new appliance

The document insert was missing appliance_id so receipts were saved as
home-level documents instead of attached to the item. Now uses
.select('id').single() on the appliance insert to get the new ID and
passes it as appliance_id on the document record.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Sprint 5 Complete: Schedule Settings + Landing Page + Automation Edit/Filtering

Sprint 5 implementation complete (27 SP) with all review issues addressed.

## Components

**Phase 1: Schedule Settings (7 SP)**
- Cron utility functions (presetToCron, cronToPreset, isValidCron)
- SchedulePicker timezone support
- Preset to cron conversion with timezone awareness

**Phase 2: Landing Page (11 SP)**
- Public landing page at / route
- Hero section with CTA
- How It Works 3-step guide
- Template showcase (5 cards)
- Mobile responsive design
- Authenticated user redirect to /dashboard

**Phase 3: Automation Edit + Log Filtering (9 SP)**
- Automation edit page (/automations/[id]/edit)
- Natural language automation creation
- Log filtering by automation, status, date range
- Extended PATCH API for automation updates

## Review Fixes
- Fix template_type hardcoding (custom instead of morning_briefing)
- Fix edit page to use PATCH API route with fallback
- Add server-side filtering to logs with query params
- Fix SchedulePicker callbacks to prevent double-invocation
- Preserve day-of-week/month in weekly/monthly schedule edits

## Test Results
- Web: 287/287 PASS (added 72 new tests)
- Type Check: PASS
- All quality checks: PASS

## Implemented User Stories
- US-304: Schedule settings
- US-901, US-902: Landing page + CTA
- US-307: Automation edit
- US-302: Natural language automation
- US-603: Log filtering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add dynamic blog sitemap — 464 article URLs were missing from sitemap

The Astro sitemap plugin only included 38 static pages because blog articles
use SSR (prerender=false). Created a dynamic /sitemap-posts.xml endpoint that
queries Sanity for all published posts. Updated robots.txt to reference both
sitemaps. Total indexed URLs: 38 → 502.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix heading backing resize glitch by using responsive CSS classes instead of computed pixels

Backing divs now copy the heading's className (including text-h2) so they
get the same responsive clamp() font-size from CSS variables. Removes the
blog-specific font-size clamp from blog.css in favor of the site-wide
text-h2 class. Fixes [slug].js the same way.

fix(core): suppress collection analyzer rules for YAML deserialization DTOs

CA2227/CA1002/MA0016 fire on settable List<T> properties required by
YamlDotNet deserialization.  CA1859 fires on a private helper using
IReadOnlyList<string> instead of the concrete List<string>.

Suppress these at the project level in JD.AI.Core since the entire
Specifications namespace consists of YAML DTOs.
